texto: Religion is the most powerful entity on earth. A phenomenon that has conscripted millions to give or sacrifice their lives without so much as a minuscule query about their chosen beliefs or particular ideology. And today thousands of years on despite the huge advent, discovery and the advance of science forensic or otherwise, millions are still prepared and equipped to fall or kill in the name of their God, their Holy Scriptures, their messengers, their prophets and their faith’.
explicacao: Citação de Cal Sarwar sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Religion is the most powerful entity on earth. A phenomenon that has conscripted millions to give…” articula fe, 9-11, bible em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como bible e christianity.

texto: I was against the Iraq war I was against the Afghan war I was against bombing Libya and Syria but to be quite honest and with a heavy heart because more innocent people are gonna be killed....We have to step in and help wipeout ISIS!
explicacao: Orientação direta de Cal Sarwar sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “I was against the Iraq war I was against the Afghan war I was against bombing Libya and Syria but…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, al-qaeda-in-iraq, iraq, útil em momentos de iraq e islam.
